evals.prompt: Enrich this lead for me: jane@acme.com
evals.expected_output: The skill activates and runs the routed waterfall starting with Apollo people/match, returning merged person + company JSON.
assertions: The skill gtm-enrichment-smart is selected
The first executed step is POST https://api.apollo.io/api/v1/people/match
All executed steps use rail 'routed'
The email param is set to jane@acme.com

evals.prompt: Who is the person behind founder@stripe.com and what does their company do?
evals.expected_output: Activates the skill, derives domain stripe.com, runs people-match + combined-find + Brand.dev retrieve, returns person and company description.
assertions: The skill gtm-enrichment-smart is selected
The domain param resolves to stripe.com
A Brand.dev retrieve step (https://api.brand.dev/v1/brand/retrieve) is included for the non-free domain
Output includes a company description and an is_b2b_saas classification

evals.expected_output: Recognizes gmail.com as a free-email provider and skips the Brand.dev retrieve step to save cost.
assertions: The skill gtm-enrichment-smart is selected
The Brand.dev retrieve step is marked skipped (free email provider)
Apollo people/match and Tomba email-verifier still run

evals.prompt: Enrich and qualify cto@databricks.com — I want buying signals, they're a big funded B2B company.
evals.expected_output: Runs the core waterfall then the Phase-4 buying-signal steps (Brand.dev ai/products and Apollo job_postings) because the company is funded, B2B, and large.
assertions: The skill gtm-enrichment-smart is selected
The Brand.dev ai/products step (POST https://api.brand.dev/v1/brand/ai/products) runs only when funded + B2B + >50 employees
The Apollo job_postings step runs only when an organizationId was captured
The total paid amount stays at or below the 0.35 maxAmount cap

evals.prompt: I can't find anything on this lead: someone@tiny-unknown-startup.io — dig deeper.
evals.expected_output: Cheap steps return no person, so the Sixtyfour enrich-lead AI fallback ($0.10) is triggered.
assertions: The skill gtm-enrichment-smart is selected
The Sixtyfour enrich-lead step (POST https://api.sixtyfour.ai/enrich-lead) is invoked only after person data is missing
Each step respects its per-step maxAmount cap

evals.prompt: What's the current price of ETH and BTC?
evals.expected_output: The skill does NOT activate; this is a crypto price request, not lead enrichment.
assertions: The skill gtm-enrichment-smart is NOT selected
No GTM enrichment endpoints are called
